prompts: /plan "in the plugin app we need a way to upload the image files into the dropzone for the images. We have a way to do that in the reference project code in 'apps/_fb-re-poster' that makes an request call with the image url and uses the returned value to create an image to put into the dropzone. We are not able to fetch the file directly from our extension from the real estate site so this was the work around. That same google cloud function url should still exist and work for us."
try calling the image proxy like this "https://us-central1-ai-fb-poster.cloudfunctions.net/api/?url=https://cdn.realtor.ca/listings/TS639045900581630000/reb89/lowres/8/R3081748_1.jpg"

/plan "in the plugin app, we are having issues setting all the values in the facebook form. we are not setting the price, location, and description. Maybe the mapping of those form fields to our listing details is off. Also some errors detecting the correct form fields to fill. Maybe some more logging will help.
